mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (payment_id, tid, mid, order_id, amount, status, payment_method, goods_name, created_at, approved_at) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{tid}, #{mid}, #{orderId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{paymentMethod}, #{goodsName}, #{createdAt}, #{approvedAt})
INSERT INTO payment_card_details (payment_id, issuer, card_number, installment_month) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{issuer}, #{cardNumber}, #{installmentMonth})

INSERT INTO cancellations (cancel_id, payment_id, cancel_amount, remained_amount, cancel_reason, cancelled_at) VALUES (#{cancelId}, #{paymentId}, #{cancelAmount}, #{remainedAmount}, #{cancelReason}, #{cancelledAt})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, cd.issuer, cd.card_number, cd.installment_month, c.id as cancel_id_pk, c.cancel_id, c.cancel_amount, c.remained_amount, c.cancel_reason, c.cancelled_at FROM payments p LEFT JOIN payment_card_details cd ON p.id = cd.payment_id LEFT JOIN cancellations c ON p.id = c.payment_id WHERE p.payment_id = #{paymentId}

SELECT p.*, cd.issuer, cd.card_number, cd.installment_month, c.id as cancel_id_pk, c.cancel_id, c.cancel_amount, c.remained_amount, c.cancel_reason, c.cancelled_at FROM payments p LEFT JOIN payment_card_details cd ON p.id = cd.payment_id LEFT JOIN cancellations c ON p.id = c.payment_id WHERE p.tid = #{tid}
mapper.update: UPDATE payments SET status = #{status} WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}
